name: Rogz Dog Grinz Treat Ball 6.4cm - Pink Medium
description: Keep your dog active, entertained, and mentally stimulated with the Rogz Dog Grinz Treat Ball (6.4 cm, Pink) . This interactive dog toy is designed to provide hours of fun by combining treat-dispensing play with bouncing and floating capabilities. Made from durable, non-toxic SEBS rubber, the ball is soft enough to protect your dog’s teeth while remaining firm enough for fetch and interactive play. The medium-sized ball features a bone-shaped opening for treats, encouraging problem-solving and longer play sessions. Its bright pink color ensures high visibility during play, whether indoors, outdoors, or in water. Lightweight and chew-resistant, it is ideal for small to medium-sized dogs, helping to support dental engagement while keeping pets entertained. Key Features Material: Soft yet durable SEBS rubber, safe for teeth and chewing Size: Medium, 6.4 cm diameter, perfect for small to medium adult dogs Treat Dispensing: Bone-shaped hole allows for filling with treats for mental stimulation Bounce & Float: Excellent bounce for fetch games and floats for water play Color: Bright pink for easy visibility Care: Hand washable for easy maintenance Benefits for Dogs Promotes physical exercise through fetch and interactive play Encourages problem-solving and mental stimulation Provides safe chewing and dental engagement Enhances bonding between dog and owner during play Safety Guidelines Intended for dog use only, not for children Supervise play to prevent accidental ingestion or damage
